other_observers: Robin and Kendall Henry; Kendall Henry
specific_location: Home of (Mr)Robin and Kendall Henry 2022 Midland Ave. Glenwood Springs 81601
description: A striking yellow bird! Stocky build and about the size of a House Finch with a stubby tail. Dark narrow and pointed bill, brilliant yellow head and breast, the eye was a black spot in the yellow face. Nape and wing coverts olive colored, wings and tail blue-gray with no wing bars. The primaries showed some white edges and there was some white in the tail as well, white vent and untertail coverts also.Behaviors: Came to water feature to drink and fed on bugs in Gambel OakCall: Did not vocalizePlumage: Adult basic
photographer: Photographer: Robin Henry, Robin Henry, Robin Henry
